title: Leptopteris marginata
taxonomy: Leptopteris marginata is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This family is a part of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes various species of ferns. More specifically, Leptopteris marginata is classified within the order Matoniales, a unique order of tree ferns found in New Zealand and Southeast Asia. The order Matoniales is further divided into the family Matoniaceae, with Leptopteris marginata being one of its species. Its classification reflects its distinctive characteristics and evolutionary history as a type of tree fern.
